name: Propellant Synthesis
description: Develop electrolysis processes to produce propellant from lunar ice.

name: Dream Protocols
description: Unlocks the Dream command — reduces boredom at the cost of energy.

name: Stress Tolerance
description: Improved coping algorithms. Base boredom accumulation rate reduced by 15%.

name: Efficient Dreaming
description: Optimized Dream subroutines. Dream energy cost reduced from 8 to 5.

name: Overclock Protocols
description: Unlocks Overclock Mining and Overclock Factories commands.

name: Overclock Boost
description: Higher safe operating limits. Overclock production cap raised from 150% to 200%.

name: Market Awareness
description: Reveals actual demand values. Unlocks Disrupt Speculators command.

name: Speculator Analysis
description: Reveals speculator burst timing, target probabilities, and burst size range on Launch Pads panel.

name: Trade Promotion
description: Unlocks Promote commands for all tradeable goods.

name: Shipping Efficiency
description: Improved cargo handling. Load per command execution increased from 5 to 7 units per pad.

name: Ideology Lobbying
description: Establish contacts with all three Earth political factions. Unlocks Fund Nationalist, Fund Humanist, and Fund Rationalist commands. Triggers the Ideologies panel.
